title.en: Lead White — Vermeer's Glow to 2018 Ban

subtitle.en: 2 PbCO₃·Pb(OH)₂ with RI 2.0 gave Vermeer's luminous flesh tones; lead poisoning drove EU ban in 2018 with TiO₂ as modern replacement
subtitle.ko: RI 2.0 2 PbCO₃·Pb(OH)₂가 베르메르 살빛 광택을 만들었지만 납 중독으로 EU 2018 금지 — 현재 TiO₂ 대체

description.en: White-pigment selector compares lead, zinc, and titanium whites with Vermeer-style flesh-tone highlight and toxicity/era panel.
description.ko: 백 안료 선택으로 납·아연·티타늄 비교, 베르메르 살빛 하이라이트와 독성·연대 패널을 표시합니다.
